checks.name: Auto Profile Suggestion
checks.description: An automatic preflight profile recommendation was generated.

checks.name: Alcohol Label Issue
checks.description: Required alcohol labeling elements may be missing.

checks.name: No Brand Palette
checks.description: No brand color palette is configured for compliance checking.

checks.name: Brand Color Deviation
checks.description: A color deviates from the configured brand palette.

checks.name: Cannabis Warning Missing
checks.description: Required cannabis warning symbols or statements may be missing.

checks.name: Cosmetics Label Issue
checks.description: Required cosmetics labeling elements may be missing.

checks.name: No Dieline Found
checks.description: No die line detected — file does not appear to be packaging artwork.

checks.name: Duplicate Content
checks.description: Duplicate or near-duplicate content detected across pages.

checks.name: EU Font Size Violation
checks.description: Text is below the minimum x-height required by EU Regulation 1169/2011.

checks.name: Allergen Not Emphasized
checks.description: An allergen may not be properly emphasized as required by EU food labeling rules.

checks.name: EU Nutrition Format
checks.description: Nutrition information format doesn't comply with EU FIR 1169/2011.

checks.name: Document Classification
checks.description: The document type has been automatically classified.

checks.name: Calories Font Too Small
checks.description: The Calories declaration may be below the FDA's minimum font size requirement.

checks.name: NFP Text Too Small
checks.description: Nutrition Facts text is below the minimum readable size required by FDA.

checks.name: Missing Bold in NFP
checks.description: Required bold formatting is missing from Nutrition Facts headings.

checks.name: Missing Nutrients
checks.description: Required nutrients may be missing from the Nutrition Facts panel.

checks.name: FDA Label Warning
checks.description: A potential FDA labeling compliance issue was detected.

checks.name: Missing GHS Elements
checks.description: Required GHS hazard label elements may be missing.

checks.name: Image Quality Issue
checks.description: An image quality concern was detected (blur, noise, or artifacts).

checks.name: Language Detected
checks.description: The document language has been identified.

checks.name: Logo Not Found
checks.description: Expected logo was not detected on this page.

checks.name: Content Safety Flag
checks.description: Potentially inappropriate content was flagged for review.

checks.name: Organic Seal Issue
checks.description: Organic certification mark may be missing or incorrectly placed.

checks.name: Pharma Font Too Small
checks.description: Text is below the minimum size required for pharmaceutical labeling.

checks.name: Processing Steps
checks.description: Processing step layer or instruction detected.

checks.name: Missing Regulatory Symbol
checks.description: A required regulatory symbol may be missing from the artwork.

checks.name: AI Scan Complete
checks.description: Summary of the AI analysis pipeline run.

checks.name: Similar Images
checks.description: Very similar or duplicate images detected in the document.

checks.name: Misspelled Word
checks.description: A potentially misspelled word was detected in the document text.

checks.name: Safe Zone Violation
checks.description: Content is placed in a restricted bleed or safety zone area.

checks.name: Text Not Outlined
checks.description: Text has not been converted to outlines for guaranteed rendering.

checks.name: No Reference File
checks.description: No reference file provided for version comparison.

checks.name: Low Color Contrast
checks.description: Text doesn't have enough contrast against its background for comfortable reading.

checks.name: Below WCAG AA
checks.description: Text-background contrast is below the WCAG AA accessibility standard.

checks.name: Not Tagged
checks.description: Document has no structure tree — it's not accessible to screen readers.

checks.name: No Language Set
checks.description: Document language is not specified, reducing accessibility.

checks.name: Missing Document Language
checks.description: The /Lang entry is missing from the document catalog.

checks.name: No Output Intent for Contrast
checks.description: Cannot verify text-background contrast for accessibility without an output intent.

checks.name: Ink Savings Estimate
checks.description: Analysis of potential ink savings through GCR optimization.

checks.name: No Spectral Data
checks.description: No CxF spectral measurement data found in output intents.

checks.name: Black Composition
checks.description: Breakdown of how black is built (pure K, rich black, registration).

checks.name: Printable Annotation
checks.description: A printable annotation is inside the trim area and will appear in output.

checks.name: Link Annotation
checks.description: A clickable link annotation is present on this page.

checks.name: Barcode Detected
checks.description: A potential barcode pattern was identified on this page.

checks.name: Low Barcode Resolution
checks.description: The barcode area resolution is below the minimum for reliable scanning.

checks.name: Missing Trim/Bleed Box
checks.description: Page boundaries needed for cutting and bleed are not defined.

checks.name: Box Hierarchy Violated
checks.description: Page boxes (Media, Crop, Bleed, Trim) are not properly nested.

checks.name: Insufficient Bleed
checks.description: Not enough image extends past the trim edge — white edges may show after cutting.

checks.name: Empty Page
checks.description: Page has no visible content.

checks.name: Content in Safety Margin
checks.description: Important content is too close to the trim edge and may be cut off.

checks.name: Content Beyond Bleed
checks.description: Content extends outside the bleed box and will be clipped.

checks.name: UserUnit Scaling
checks.description: Non-standard page scaling detected which may confuse imposition.

checks.name: Non-Standard Orientation
checks.description: Page has an unusual rotation or orientation.

checks.name: Inconsistent Page Sizes
checks.description: Pages have different dimensions which may cause printing issues.

checks.name: Device-Dependent Color
checks.description: Color is specified without a profile, so output will vary by device.

checks.name: Spot Color Without Fallback
checks.description: A spot color has no process color fallback for proofing.

checks.name: Lab Color Used
checks.description: CIE Lab color used — may require special handling at the RIP.

checks.name: Ink Coverage Too High
checks.description: Total ink exceeds the maximum for this paper type, risking smearing or drying issues.

checks.name: Registration Color
checks.description: All inks at 100% — only for registration marks, never for artwork.

checks.name: No Output Intent
checks.description: No color profile is specified — colors may shift unpredictably during printing.

checks.name: Mixed Color Spaces
checks.description: Different color spaces used on the same page may cause inconsistency.

checks.name: CalRGB Color
checks.description: Calibrated RGB color used — should be converted to CMYK for print.

checks.name: CalGray Color
checks.description: Calibrated gray color used — should use DeviceGray for consistency.

checks.name: Indexed Color
checks.description: Indexed/palette color used — limited color range.

checks.name: Pattern Color Space
checks.description: Pattern-based color used — may render differently across RIPs.

checks.name: Separation Color
checks.description: Separation color space detected.

checks.name: DeviceN Color
checks.description: Multi-channel DeviceN color detected.

checks.name: Color Space Inventory
checks.description: Summary of color space types used in the document.

checks.name: ICC Profile Mismatch
checks.description: Embedded ICC profile doesn't match the output intent.

checks.name: RGB in CMYK Workflow
checks.description: RGB color found in a CMYK-targeted workflow.

checks.name: Impure Black
checks.description: Black areas use unnecessary color inks, risking visible misregistration.

checks.name: Untagged Color
checks.description: Color space used without an associated ICC profile.

checks.name: Wide Gamut Color
checks.description: Color is outside the typical print gamut.

checks.name: Overink Warning
checks.description: Multiple color operations accumulate high ink levels.

checks.name: Rich Black Text
checks.description: Text uses more than one CMYK ink — pure K (100/0/0/0) is recommended at every size to avoid misregistration.

checks.name: Multiple Page Sizes
checks.description: Document contains pages of different sizes which may complicate imposition.

checks.name: Missing Font
checks.description: A font is not embedded — text may display incorrectly at the printer.

checks.name: Full Font Embedded
checks.description: The entire font is embedded instead of just the characters used, increasing file size.

checks.name: System Font Used
checks.description: A standard system font is used which may render differently on other devices.

checks.name: Type 3 Font
checks.description: User-drawn Type 3 font detected — quality may vary across RIPs.

checks.name: Missing ToUnicode
checks.description: CID font is missing a ToUnicode map — text search and copy may not work.

checks.name: Missing CIDSystemInfo
checks.description: CID font is missing system information needed for correct rendering.

checks.name: No Font Encoding
checks.description: Font lacks encoding information — characters may map incorrectly.

checks.name: TrueType Not Embedded
checks.description: A TrueType font is referenced but not embedded in the file.

checks.name: OpenType Not Embedded
checks.description: An OpenType/CFF font is referenced but not embedded.

checks.name: Incomplete Font
checks.description: Font descriptor is present but the actual font data is missing.

checks.name: Multiple Master Font
checks.description: Multiple Master font detected — limited RIP support.

checks.name: Faux Bold
checks.description: Software-simulated bold detected — may not print as expected.

checks.name: Faux Italic
checks.description: Software-simulated italic detected — may not print as expected.

checks.name: Damaged Font
checks.description: The font program appears corrupt or has a type mismatch.

checks.name: Hairline Stroke
checks.description: A very thin line may disappear or print inconsistently.

checks.name: Small Text on Thin Stroke
checks.description: Thin stroked text may be hard to read at small sizes.

checks.name: No ICC Profile
checks.description: No ICC color profile embedded for color-managed output.

checks.name: Invalid ICC Profile
checks.description: The embedded ICC profile is corrupt or invalid.

checks.name: ICC Version Mismatch
checks.description: ICC profile version doesn't match the PDF specification.

checks.name: Wrong ICC Device Class
checks.description: ICC profile device class doesn't match usage context.

checks.name: Low Image Resolution
checks.description: An image doesn't have enough detail for sharp printing.

checks.name: Excessive Resolution
checks.description: An image has far more detail than needed, increasing file size unnecessarily.

checks.name: Wrong Color Mode
checks.description: An image uses screen colors (RGB) instead of print colors (CMYK).

checks.name: No Image Compression
checks.description: An image isn't compressed, making the file unnecessarily large.

checks.name: Inline Image
checks.description: A small image is embedded directly in the page stream instead of as a resource.

checks.name: Upscaled Image
checks.description: An image has been stretched beyond its actual size, causing visible blur.

checks.name: LZW Compression
checks.description: Image uses LZW compression which is prohibited in some print standards.

checks.name: JPEG2000 Format
checks.description: Uses JPEG2000 format which may not be supported by all RIPs.

checks.name: 16-Bit Image
checks.description: Image uses 16-bit color depth, unusual for standard print workflows.

checks.name: OPI Reference
checks.description: References an external high-res image that must be available at print time.

checks.name: Alternate Image
checks.description: Contains alternate images that should be stripped before printing.

checks.name: OPI in Resources
checks.description: OPI reference found in page resources.

checks.name: Alternate in Resources
checks.description: Alternate image reference found in page resources.

checks.name: Sheared Image
checks.description: Image has a non-orthogonal transform applied (skewed).

checks.name: Rotated Image
checks.description: Image is rotated at a non-standard angle.

checks.name: Flipped Image
checks.description: Image appears to be mirrored horizontally or vertically.

checks.name: Extreme Scaling
checks.description: Image is scaled to an extreme percentage of its original size.

checks.name: TAC Heatmap
checks.description: Total Area Coverage data for this page.

checks.name: Ink Separation Data
checks.description: Per-channel ink usage statistics.

checks.name: Ink Channel Inventory
checks.description: Summary of all ink channels used in the document.

checks.name: No XMP Metadata
checks.description: XMP metadata stream is missing — may be required by some standards.

checks.name: Overprint On
checks.description: Overprint is enabled — colors will mix where they overlap instead of knocking out.

checks.name: Overprint Off for Spot
checks.description: Overprint is disabled for a spot color, which may cause unexpected knockouts.

checks.name: Overprint Mode Mismatch
checks.description: Overprint mode setting is inconsistent.

checks.name: White Fill Path
checks.description: A white-filled path may knock out background content unintentionally.

checks.name: Dieline Detected
checks.description: A die line layer was identified in this packaging file.

checks.name: Missing Dieline
checks.description: No die line detected — expected for packaging artwork.

checks.name: Unknown Spot Color
checks.description: A spot color is used that isn't in a standard color book.

checks.name: Spot Color Fallback Issue
checks.description: The process color fallback for a spot color may not be accurate.

checks.name: Similar Spot Names
checks.description: Multiple spot colors have very similar names — may be duplicates.

checks.name: G7 Compliance
checks.description: G7 process control readiness assessment.

checks.name: GRACoL Compliance
checks.description: GRACoL 2006 compliance validation.

checks.name: ISO 12647 Compliance
checks.description: ISO 12647 standard compliance check.

checks.name: Butt Cap on Thin Line
checks.description: A butt line cap on a thin stroke may cause visible gaps — round cap recommended.

checks.name: Rich Black Stroke
checks.description: A thin stroke (0.5-1.0pt) uses more than one CMYK ink - pure K or a single spot is recommended on fine line work.

checks.name: JavaScript Found
checks.description: Document contains JavaScript which is not allowed in print workflows.

checks.name: Form Fields Present
checks.description: Interactive form fields detected — these won't print as expected.

checks.name: PDF Layers Detected
checks.description: Optional content layers (OCGs) are present.

checks.name: Embedded Files
checks.description: Document contains embedded file attachments.

checks.name: Small Text
checks.description: Text is below the minimum readable size for print.

checks.name: White Text
checks.description: White text detected — verify it's intentional and not hidden content.

checks.name: Transparency Used
checks.description: Page uses transparency which must be flattened for older workflows.

checks.name: Non-Standard Blend Mode
checks.description: A blend mode other than Normal is used, which may flatten unpredictably.

checks.name: Soft Mask
checks.description: Image uses a soft mask, increasing rendering complexity.

checks.name: Low Opacity
checks.description: Content has very low opacity and may be nearly invisible in print.

checks.name: Transparency Group
checks.description: A transparency group is defined on this page.
